caption:
London’s largest free flower festival is on NOW and the displays this year are STRONG 🌸 This is Chelsea in Bloom 2026 and the theme is Out of This World 🚀🪐

What do you think of our top 10, number 1 is a special one in honour of someone’s 100th birthday 🥳🌍🐻‍❄️

📍 @sloanestreetsw1 @kingsroad.london @pavilionroad 
🗓️ 18th - 24th May 
🎟️ Free to see, no tickets required
